title: Era of Optimization
description: Optimization made simple, 27 Mods that increase game performance
body:
### **ERA OF OPTIMIZATION IS BEING WORKED ON AGAIN FOR 1.21.5, PLEASE BE PATIENT FOR FUTURE UPDATES**
# What is Era of Optimization
Its a modpack made by all, for all. The main goal for this modpack is for one simple reason, simple make your preformance better. This modpack is fully vannila and is simple full of preformance mods like **Sodium** or **Noisium**, this also has some client side mods just for simplesitcy like **JEI** or **AppleSkin**.            
## Why would YOU want it
Well its simple... For fun, its simple... Actully very simple, its just for fun this was made for fun, whether you wanna build or if you wanna explore with friends it will probably be fun, and better. Have fun :)                                                  
### Notes
Report error in the github                                                              
You want multiplayer without paying? Just add e4mc, though it may be laggy                     
For those of you that got not as good as a computer I recomomend just doing the shaders in medium or lower                                                                                            
Turns out the github is broken                                                             
## Dedication               
Thanks to all the mods, resource packs, shaders, and more for all the help. Yall make the MC community better.
